title: EPIC: Linkright Meta-Programming & Orchestration Implementation
description: Comprehensive implementation of BMAD-level sophistication in Linkright: LRB (Linkright Builder) module for meta-programming, IDE-agnostic command system across 19 IDEs, party mode orchestration (lr-discuss), distributed collaboration hooks, and enhancement of all 157 existing Linkright files to match BMAD quality standards. Total: 939 files across 8 phases plus verification.

title: Phase 1: LRB Agent Workflow (40 files)
description: Implement the complete agent-builder workflow (40 files): 11 data/ standards files defining four-field persona system, 2 templates/, 8 steps-c/ CREATE steps, 9 steps-e/ EDIT steps, 7 steps-v/ VALIDATE steps, 3 workflow orchestrators. This is the foundation - agents that build agents. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/. Output: _lr/lrb/workflows/agent/ with complete tri-modal workflow structure.

title: Phase 1.1: Create data/ standards files (11 files)
description: Create 11 data/ files: persona-properties.md, principles-crafting.md, communication-presets.csv, agent-architecture.md, agent-compilation.md, agent-menu-patterns.md, agent-metadata.md, agent-validation.md, brainstorm-context.md, critical-actions.md, understanding-agent-types.md. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/data/. These are READ-ONLY knowledge files that guide agent creation.
notes:
✅ COMPLETE: All 11 data/ standards files created for LRB agent workflow.

Files created:
1. persona-properties.md — Four-field persona system (role, identity, communication_style, principles)
2. principles-crafting.md — Agent principles design and validation guide
3. communication-presets.csv — Reusable communication style templates for agents
4. agent-architecture.md — Agent structure decisions (hasSidecar decision matrix)
5. agent-compilation.md — Agent compilation process and validation
6. agent-menu-patterns.md — Menu design patterns and best practices
7. agent-metadata.md — Metadata field specifications and validation
8. agent-validation.md — Comprehensive validation checklist (7 stages)
9. brainstorm-context.md — Agent ideation and design framework
10. critical-actions.md — Critical actions guide (initialization + restrictions)
11. understanding-agent-types.md — Agent type decision framework (stateless vs sidecar)

All files include proper BMAD file references and are tailored for Linkright context (paths, modules, terminology).

title: Phase 1.2: Create templates/ files (2 files)
description: Create 2 template files: agent-plan.template.md, agent-template.md. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/templates/. These are output skeletons that steps write into during workflow execution.

title: Phase 1.3: Create steps-c/ CREATE phase (8 files)
description: Create 8 steps-c/ files: step-01-brainstorm.md through step-08-celebrate.md. CRITICAL: step-04-persona.md contains four-field persona builder logic. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/steps-c/. Each step is one atomic operation.

title: Phase 1.4: Create steps-e/ EDIT phase (9 files)
description: Create 9 steps-e/ files for targeted modifications to existing agents. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/steps-e/. Allows iterative refinement of agent personas, commands, and metadata.

title: Phase 1.5: Create steps-v/ VALIDATE phase (7 files)
description: Create 7 steps-v/ files to audit agent compliance across dimensions. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/steps-v/. Ensures field purity, principle quality, command structure correctness.

title: Phase 1.6: Create workflow orchestrators (3 files)
description: Create 3 workflow orchestrator files: workflow-create.md, workflow-edit.md, workflow-validate.md. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/agent/workflow-*.md. These route users to correct phase based on intent.

title: Phase 1.2: Agent-Infrastructure Integration Guide (5 files)
description: Create infrastructure integration patterns for LRB agents: agent-orchestration.md (lr-orchestrator routing), agent-mongodb-patterns.md (signal/JD/resume CRUD), agent-chroma-retrieval.md (semantic query patterns), agent-beads-integration.md (task creation/dependency binding), agent-mcp-tools.md (n8n and external tool access). These patterns enable agents to interact with Linkright's data and workflow layers.

title: Phase 1.3: Sync Module Agent Specifications (7 files)
description: Create detailed agent specifications for 8 Sync agents: sync-parser.spec.md, sync-scout.spec.md, sync-linker.spec.md, sync-inquisitor.spec.md, sync-refiner.spec.md, sync-sizer.spec.md, sync-styler.spec.md. Each spec includes: persona, infrastructure dependencies (MongoDB collections, Chroma queries, Beads task triggers), menu items, critical actions, and integration with lr-orchestrator/lr-tracker. DEPENDS ON: Phase 1.2 (infrastructure patterns).
close_reason: Completed all 9 agent specifications as per implementation plan.

title: Phase 1.4: Multi-Agent Workflow Patterns (3 files)
description: Create multi-agent coordination patterns for Sync module: agent-handoff-protocol.md (state passing between agents, Beads dependency chaining), agent-error-recovery.md (fault tolerance, retry logic, escalation to user), agent-state-machine.md (status flow across agents: extract→inquisitor→linker→refiner→sizer→styler). Patterns enable agents to work as orchestrated system rather than isolated tools. DEPENDS ON: Phase 1.3 (individual agent specs).
close_reason: Created all 3 multi-agent coordination pattern files for the Sync module.

title: Verification: Test IDE Command Routing
description: Multi-IDE test: Run same command (/lr-agent-sync-parser) in 3 different IDEs. Verify: 1) All load same agent successfully, 2) Activation works identically, 3) Menu system responds correctly in all 3 IDEs.

title: Verification: Test Party Mode Discussion
description: Multi-agent orchestration test: Trigger lr-discuss with a career decision question. Verify: 1) Correct 2-3 agents selected, 2) Each agent speaks in character, 3) Natural cross-talk, 4) User can direct questions to specific agents.

title: Verification: Test Meta-Programming Loop
description: Full meta-programming test: 1) Use LRB to create new agent, 2) Agent added to agent-manifest.csv, 3) Installer regenerates command stubs, 4) New agent appears in lr-discuss roster, 5) Test party mode with new agent participating.

Agents that build modules. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/module/. Output: _lr/lrb/workflows/module/.

title: Phase 2.4: Create steps-c/ CREATE phase (7 files)

description: Implement the workflow-builder workflow (53 files - most comprehensive): 15 data/ standards files, 3 templates/, 11 steps-c/ CREATE, 7 steps-e/ EDIT, 12 steps-v/ VALIDATE, 5 workflow orchestrators. Workflows that build workflows (highest level of meta-programming). Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/. Output: _lr/lrb/workflows/workflow/.

title: Phase 3.1: Create data/ standards (15 files)
description: Create 15 data/ files - most comprehensive knowledge base. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/data/. Workflow design patterns, step isolation rules, phase architecture.

description: Create 3 template files for workflow outputs. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/templates/.

description: Create 11 steps-c/ files. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/steps-c/.

description: Create 7 steps-e/ files. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/steps-e/.

description: Create 5 workflow orchestrators. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/workflows/workflow/workflow-*.md.

title: Phase 4: LRB Agent Personas (3 files)
description: Create 3 meta-agent persona files: bond.md (agent-builder specialist), morgan.md (module-builder specialist), wendy.md (workflow-builder specialist). These agents embody Linkright's meta-programming philosophy. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmb/agents/. Output: _lr/lrb/agents/. Each uses four-field persona system with expert activator principle.

title: Phase 5: IDE Integration Infrastructure (25 files + 760 stubs)
description: Create manifest-driven command system: agent-manifest.csv (single source of truth for all 14+ agents), workflow-manifest.csv, 3 additional manifests, 19 IDE config YAML files, 2 customize system files, installer script to auto-generate 760 command stubs. Reference: bmad/_bmad/_config/. Output: _lr/_config/manifests/, _lr/_config/ides/, command stubs in 19 IDE folders.

title: Phase 6: Party Mode Orchestration (9 files)
description: Create lr-discuss multi-agent orchestration workflow (9 files): workflow.md (intelligent agent selection logic), 3 step files, brainstorming workflow with 4 steps. Reference: bmad/_bmad/core/workflows/party-mode/. Output: _lr/core/workflows/lr-discuss/. Enables context-aware agent selection.

title: Phase 7: Distributed Collaboration (3 files)
description: Create customize.yaml override system (3 files): agent-overrides.yaml, persistent-memories.yaml, update LINKRIGHT-BEADS.md with LRB patterns. Reference: bmad/_bmad/_config/agents/*.customize.yaml. Output: _lr/_config/custom/. Enables per-project agent customization.

title: Phase 8: Update Existing Linkright Files (157 files)
description: ENHANCEMENT of all 157 existing Linkright files to match BMAD quality: 12 agent files, ~120 workflow step files, ~25 data/template files. Preserve all Linkright domain logic. Enhance: structural compliance, menu handling, persona depth, validation patterns. Reference: bmad/_bmad/bmm/agents/*.md patterns.

title: Phase 8.1: Enhance Sync module agents (8 files)
description: Enhance 8 sync agents: sync-parser.md, sync-scout.md, sync-linker.md, sync-refiner.md, sync-sizer.md, sync-styler.md, sync-inquisitor.md, sync-tracker.md. Compare to bmad/_bmad/bmm/agents/*.md. Add proper XML structure, ensure four-field persona separation, improve menu handling, enhance activation sequence. Preserve all JD/ATS/signal domain logic.
close_reason: Successfully enhanced all 8 Sync/Core agents with BMAD XML architecture, refined personas, and standardized activation steps.

title: Phase 8.2: Enhance Flex + Squick agents (2 files)
description: Enhance flex-publicist.md (compare to bmad/_bmad/cis/agents/storyteller.md) and squick-architect.md (compare to bmad/_bmad/bmm/agents/architect.md). Structural improvements only, preserve creative/shipping domain logic.

title: Phase 8.3: Enhance Core agents (2 files)
description: Enhance lr-orchestrator.md and lr-tracker.md. Compare to bmad/_bmad/core/agents/bmad-master.md for orchestration patterns.

title: Phase 8.4: Enhance Sync workflow files (~120 files)
description: Enhance all step files across 3 sync workflows: sync-signal-capture/, sync-jd-optimize/, sync-application-track/. Compare to bmad/_bmad/bmm/workflows/ patterns for structure. Preserve all career operations logic.

title: Verification: Test LRB Agent Creation
description: End-to-end test: Use Bond agent to create a new Linkright agent. Verify: 1) All 8 steps execute, 2) step-04-persona produces valid four-field YAML, 3) Final agent.md has correct XML structure, 4) Agent can be loaded and activated.
